REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (14552 Lark Street, San Leandro Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The sale was confirmed at $510,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 21, 2016. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required. The Court granted the Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.
